brand_voice_note: Bold, athletic, and playfully confident beauty that treats makeup as performance gear built to move with you from morning to night.

concepts.primary_text:
Your makeup shouldn't tap out before you do.

Lock & Go locks makeup in place with an ultra-light, flexible finish that never feels tight, sticky, or heavy. Sweat-tested by professional athletes for 16-hour wear.

Dampen. Bounce. Lock. Confidence should carry you from morning to night.
concepts.headline: Sweat It Out. Keep the Look.
concepts.why_it_works: It names the exact friction active women face - makeup sliding off mid-motion - then answers it with the sweat-tested, 16-hour performance claim.
concepts.visual_direction: The setting spray bottle standing on a gym bench next to a folded towel, water bottle, and resistance band.

concepts.primary_text:
The secret to a finish that never looks cakey.

The angled edge blends into contour areas while the rounded body buffs product into skin for a seamless, natural finish. Foundation, concealer, powder, setting spray - it does it all.

One sponge. Zero streaks.
concepts.headline: A Flawless, Natural Finish
concepts.why_it_works: For a $14 essential the buyer just wants the result, so leading with the smooth, never-cakey finish is the fastest path to yes.
concepts.visual_direction: The makeup sponge on a marble vanity next to an open compact and a soft linen cloth.
